item.title: 0.4.2 beta (build 24)
item.description:
Groovyday 0.4.2 private beta

  • Artwork, playback, visualizer controls, and right-click menus now persist throughout Dockscape
  • The expanded scene is softly opaque at Dock level and fades transparent into applications above
  • Synced lyrics can appear just above the Dock without fading with the Metal scene
  • Waves gain denser audio-led motion; Skyline distributes musical response across the full width

This is an opt-in development build for personal testing.
